name: Almond Slivered Frozen Bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the bananas.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the honey and juice from one lemon until well combined.
3. Dip each banana into the mixture, ensuring it is completely covered.
4. Roll the coated banana in almond slices.
5. Place the bananas on waxed paper.
6. Freeze for 3 hours.
7. Eat!
